name: Cain Barzard
description: Cain is a short elderly man with combed hair, and a long mustache and beard. He also wears a clock, and his eyes seem to be always closed. Under his cloak, Cain wears trousers, and a long shirt that bears the crest of Danafor. He seem like a drunk, and strange, weak old man but deep down he might be a powerful fighter and wanted to have revenge on Meliodas for destroying their kingdom long time ago, he seem to be shock when he found out he wasn't Meliodas' son and that he didn't age.
